tasks.label: Bootstrap Python Dev Environment
tasks.command: PYTHON_BIN="$(command -v python3.12 || true)"; if [ -z "$PYTHON_BIN" ]; then echo 'Error: python3.12 was not found on PATH. Install Python 3.12 so editor type checking matches the Docker runtime.'; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -x ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python ]; then echo 'Bootstrapping .venv...'; "$PYTHON_BIN" -m venv ${workspaceFolder}/.venv; elif ! ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -c 'import sys; raise SystemExit(0 if sys.version_info[:2] == (3, 12) else 1)'; then echo 'Error: .venv exists but is not Python 3.12. Remove .venv and rerun this task.'; exit 1; fi; ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel; ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e "${workspaceFolder}[app,runtime,test]"; PATH="${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin:$PATH" ${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python -m prisma generate
tasks.detail: Create/update the Python 3.12 .venv editor environment with app/runtime/test deps and generated Prisma client

tasks.label: Check README Sync
tasks.detail: Verify README.md snippets match .env.example and docker-compose.yml.

tasks.label: Run All Tests
tasks.command: docker build --progress=plain --target python-test -f ${workspaceFolder}/docker/Dockerfile ${workspaceFolder} && docker build --progress=plain --target frontend-builder -f ${workspaceFolder}/docker/Dockerfile --build-arg ENVIRONMENT=local --build-arg APP_VERSION=local ${workspaceFolder}
tasks.detail: Run the README sync check, aggregate Docker python-test target, and frontend-builder target to match backend quality checks and frontend build coverage from CI.

tasks.label: Start Development Stack
tasks.command: if [ ! -f ${workspaceFolder}/.env ]; then echo 'Error: .env file not found. Copy .env.example to .env and configure it.'; exit 1; fi && docker compose -f ${workspaceFolder}/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
tasks.detail: Start Ragtime development stack with hot-reload

tasks.label: Rebuild Development Stack
tasks.command: if [ ! -f ${workspaceFolder}/.env ]; then echo 'Error: .env file not found. Copy .env.example to .env and configure it.'; exit 1; fi && docker compose -f ${workspaceFolder}/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml build --no-cache && docker compose -f ${workspaceFolder}/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up --force-recreate
